name: claude-bridge
description: Bridge server for Claude Agent SDK integration with Orkestrator AI

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --format=esm --external @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk --outfile=dist/index.js && bun run vendor
scripts.vendor: rm -rf dist/node_modules && mkdir -p dist/node_modules/@anthropic-ai && cp -R node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-* dist/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/
